info.title: PrismaLens API

delete.summary: Delete a repository (must be unlinked first)

get.summary: List timeline entries for an incident

Create connection for a GitHub App installation

Create a new alert mapping rule

post.summary: Test mapping rules against sample alert data

Get available models from models registry

Save an encrypted LLM API key for a provider

get.summary: Get credential status for all LLM providers
Get investigation policies for all tiers
